title: microseris neozelandica
intro: Microseris neozelandica, also known as New Zealand Daisy or Silver Ragwort, is a flowering plant species native to New Zealand and Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce pain. The health benefits of Microseris neozelandica include its potential to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and provide relief from digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to treat a variety of health conditions.
